name: ai.sugra/api-mcp
title: Sugra API
description: Gateway between LLM agents and world data through eight tools and a bundled endpoint catalog.

environmentVariables.name: SUGRA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Sugra API key (sugra_...). Required for data tools; catalog tools work without it. Free key: https://app.sugra.ai/settings/billing (50 req/day). Only env var needed for local installs and directory sandboxes.
